scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),cp=require('child_process'),r=process.cwd(),N=String.fromCharCode(0);function L(b){if(b.length<4||b.length%2)return!1;let p=Math.min(400,Math.floor(b.length/2)),z=0,i;for(i=0;i<p;i++)if(b[2*i+1]===0)z++;return p>=4&&z/p>.72}function D(b){let n=b.length;if(n>=2&&b[0]===255&&b[1]===254)return b.subarray(2).toString('utf16le');if(n>=2&&b[0]===254&&b[1]===255){let x=b.subarray(2),s=Buffer.allocUnsafe(x.length);for(let i=0;i+1<x.length;i+=2){s[i]=x[i+1];s[i+1]=x[i]}return s.toString('utf16le')}if(n>=3&&b[0]===239&&b[1]===187&&b[2]===191)return b.subarray(3).toString('utf8');if(L(b))return b.toString('utf16le');return b.toString('utf8').split(N).join('')}function F(p){let b=fs.readFileSync(p);if(!b.includes(0))return;fs.writeFileSync(p,D(b).split(N).join(''),'utf8')}function W(d){if(!fs.existsSync(d))return;for(let n of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:!0})){let p=path.join(d,n.name);if(n.isDirectory())W(p);else{let e=path.extname(n.name);if(['.mjs','.cjs','.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx','.mts','.cts'].includes(e))F(p)}}}W(path.join(r,'scripts'));W(path.join(r,'src'));['vite.config.ts','vite.config.mjs','vite.config.js','postcss.config.js','tailwind.config.js','vitest.config.ts','vitest.config.mjs','vitest.config.js'].forEach(n=>{let p=path.join(r,n);if(fs.existsSync(p))F(p)});let m='dev',f=process.argv.includes('--force'),a=[path.join(r,'scripts','vite-entry.mjs'),m];if(f)a.push('--force');process.exit(cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,a,{stdio:'inherit',cwd:r}).status??1)" --

scripts.test: npm run fix-encoding --silent && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const q=String.fromCharCode(34);const n=String.fromCharCode(10);const t=['import { defineConfig } from ',q,'vitest/config',q,';'].join('');const u=['export default defineConfig({','  test: {','    environment: '+q+'node'+q+',','    include: ['+q+'src/**/*.test.ts'+q+']','  }','});'].join(n);fs.writeFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'vitest.config.mjs'),[t,'',u,''].join(n),'utf8');" && vitest run --environment node
